sources.excerpt: Official 90 Second Pizza site identifying Georgetown at 1077 Wisconsin Avenue NW, linking pickup, describing long-fermented dough, and identifying vegan cheese as a dairy alternative.

Restaurant-issued FAQ stating there is no gluten-free pizza, dough is handmade and baked in one brick oven, a gluten-free product cannot be guaranteed, and supplier plants process nut products despite no peanut or peanut-oil use.
rowIdentifiers: DO YOU HAVE GLUTEN FREE OPTIONS?
DOES YOUR PIZZA CONTAIN PEANUTS OR PEANUT OIL?
notes: The FAQ is global guidance, not a complete item-by-allergen matrix.

sources.excerpt: Retained third-party text rendering of the current Georgetown Toast menu preserving 34 item links, descriptions, prices, categories, and direct Toast item URLs; its renderer omits the directly visible final Miscellaneous Pizza Dough row.
notes: This artifact remains classified third_party and is not promoted to restaurant-issued allergen authority.
Pizza Dough was confirmed on the direct browser surface because the text proxy omits the final Miscellaneous section.
